summary: The backend is genuinely implemented and reproducible, but final-submission credibility depends on tightening the explanation layer around simulator realism, hybrid PPO control, and the canonical official result path.

status_items.note: PPO exists, but evaluated policy behavior is safety-constrained and hybridized.
Canonical path exists, but repository contains multiple competing historical result trees.

major_risks: Repo may overstate the autonomy of the PPO controller because the evaluated path includes substantial rule-based override and safety logic.
Repo may overstate routing realism if OSPF-like forwarding baselines are described as full routing protocol simulation.
Multiple historical and 'official' result directories can confuse reviewers about which outputs are canonical.
Optional forecasting and impact-predictor components are implemented, but can be misrepresented as central if not described carefully.

critical_before_submission.item: State simulator assumptions and abstraction level clearly.
critical_before_submission.done: Reviewer docs explicitly say forwarding-level routing, simplified energy model, and QoS/stability guard abstractions.

critical_before_submission.item: Describe PPO as a hybrid safety-constrained controller.
critical_before_submission.why: Prevents overclaiming what RL alone achieved.
critical_before_submission.done: Submission language matches the implemented evaluation path.

critical_before_submission.item: Declare one canonical official benchmark path.
critical_before_submission.done: One command, one manifest, one output folder are clearly named.

critical_before_submission.item: Quarantine stale exports and legacy official-looking result trees.
critical_before_submission.done: Submission bundle excludes or clearly labels historical artifacts.

important_but_not_blocking.item: Explain forecasting and impact-predictor scope honestly.
important_but_not_blocking.done: Docs specify that forecasting is online heuristic forecasting and the impact predictor is optional.

important_but_not_blocking.why: Prevents reviewers from misreading duplicates as extra baselines.
important_but_not_blocking.done: Canonical baseline taxonomy table appears in submission docs.

important_but_not_blocking.item: Document that file artifacts are primary and SQLite is secondary.
important_but_not_blocking.done: Reviewer docs explain artifact authority and DB role.

nice_to_have_polish.item: Refactor oversized environment/controller logic after submission.
nice_to_have_polish.done: Control logic is split into smaller modules.

nice_to_have_polish.why: Current integration tests skew toward wiring and shape checks.
nice_to_have_polish.done: Tests assert hypothesis classification and canonical filtering semantics.
